summary: TWO_COLUMN: narrow-valley quadratic f=0.08x²+0.9y² contours on axes. Both vanilla GD (BLUE) and GD+momentum μ=0.9 (GREEN) run 60 iterations from (3.5, 2.2). ValueTracker t_tr reveals both trajectories via always_redraw paths + dots; momentum dampens zigzag. Right panel has live iter, ‖x‖, f(x) for each.
